United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Courtside - Live
programme.desc: Coverage of professional tennis matches.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest v Aston Villa.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League
programme.desc: Action from Aston Villa v Nottingham Forest in the semi-final second-leg tie.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Dricus Du Plessis v Kamaru Usman. Action from the middleweight bout at Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, plus the undercard for UFC Fight Night 281.

programme.title: UFC Greatest Fights
programme.desc: We take a look back at UFC 195 as Robbie Lawler and Carlos Condit met in the Octagon in the MGM Grand in Las Vegas.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1995 final in Vienna between Louis van Gaal's Ajax and AC Milan. A star-studded Ajax team featured Edwin van der Sar, Ronald and Frank de Boer and Edgar Davids.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best batting action from West Indies v Sri Lanka in the second Test of the series.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best bowling action from West Indies v Sri Lanka in the second Test of the series.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 10th round of the season, which took place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter.

programme.title: Premier League Legends
programme.desc: This episode looks back on the career of Arsenal legend Ian Wright. The former England man scored 113 Premier League goals during his top flight career with Arsenal and West Ham.

programme.title: Premier League Legends
programme.desc: A look at former Tottenham and Arsenal defender Sol Campbell's time in the Premier League, including his hugely controversial move across North London.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 6 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 10th round of the season, which took place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter.

programme.title: Live: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Coverage from the second day of the 10th round of the season, which takes place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter. The competition returns from a seven-week break after the most recent round in Louisiana was postponed at the end of June. England's Tyrrell Hatton won the last event in Andalucia, Spain, to claim his first victory of the 2026 season at the ninth time of asking.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Gotham FC v Seattle Reign.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Denver Summit v Portland Thorns.

programme.title: TCR World Tour Review
programme.desc: Action from round eight at Circuito Internacional de Vila Real in Portugal.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the 2026 Rally Estonia.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Dricus Du Plessis v Kamaru Usman. Action from the middleweight bout at Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, plus the undercard for UFC Fight Night 281.

programme.title: UFC: The Ultimate Fighter
programme.desc: MMA fighters train and compete against each other for a contract with the UFC, coached by Daniel Cormier and Michael Bisping.

programme.title: Sun Belt Conference Football Media Days
programme.desc: Covering everything you missed from the college gridiron.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Junior quarterback Gunner Stockton and the No. 5 Bulldogs host the Thundering Herd. Stockton, a 6-foot-1 junior from Tiger, Ga., took over for the injured Carson Beck and led Georgia to a 22-19 overtime victory over Texas in the 2024 SEC title game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: A heavyweight bout in the SEC sees the No. 15 Volunteers (2-0) hosting the No. 6 Bulldogs (2-0). Georgia's 31-17 victory last season was its eighth in a row over Tennessee. Bulldogs tight end Oscar Delp had a pair of TD catches in the 2024 win.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Bulldogs (3-0, 1-0 SEC) take on the No. 17 Crimson Tide (2-1, 0-0). Alabama has won both meetings since Georgia claimed the 2021 title over the Tide. Ryan Williams (ALA) posted 177 receiving yards in last year's 41-34 win.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Syracuse Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Syracuse Orange.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Bulldogs (3-1, 1-1 SEC) try to continue their mastery of the Wildcats (2-2, 0-2) with a 16th straight victory. Georgia tries to bounce back after a 24-21 loss to Alabama. Seth McGowan (UK) boasts 387 rushing yards and seven touchdowns.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 10 Bulldogs face the Tigers for the 130th time. Georgia leads the Deep South's Oldest Rivalry 65-56-8 after collecting an eighth straight series victory in 2024. Gunner Stockton created three TDs when Georgia thumped Kentucky 35-14 on Oct. 4.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Rebels (6-0, 3-0 SEC) and No. 9 Bulldogs (5-1, 3-1) play a high-stakes game between the hedges. Ole Miss has won two of the last three meetings after a 28-10 victory in 2024, but Georgia won the last six get-togethers at Sanford Stadium.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: A storied rivalry sees No. 5 Georgia take on Florida in Jacksonville, Fla. The Bulldogs lead the all-time series 57-44-2, and won each the past four meetings by double-digit margins. Georgia comes off a 43-35 win over then-No. 5 Ole Miss on Oct. 18.

programme.title: August 4th: An Olympic Odyssey
programme.desc: A look at some of the most historic moments in the Olympic Games that have occurred on August 4th, including Jesse Owens' win in front of Adolf Hitler in 1936.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games
programme.desc: Another chance to see the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro in Glasgow.

programme.title: A-Z: Commonwealth Games
programme.desc: A look at some of the stories, symbols, and standout moments that make this one of the world's most vibrant and exciting sporting events.

programme.title: Tom Daley: 1.6 Seconds
programme.desc: Tom Daley's journey from Olympic prodigy to national treasure, through athletic triumphs, losing his dad, coming out, and intense public pressure.

programme.title: August 4th: An Olympic Odyssey
programme.desc: A look at some of the most historic moments in the Olympic Games that have occurred on August 4th, including Jesse Owens' win in front of Adolf Hitler in 1936.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games
programme.desc: Another chance to see the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro in Glasgow.

programme.title: Tom Daley: 1.6 Seconds
programme.desc: Tom Daley's journey from Olympic prodigy to national treasure, through athletic triumphs, losing his dad, coming out, and intense public pressure.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games
programme.desc: Another chance to see the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro in Glasgow.

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the day session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow. The games first took place back in Hamilton, Canada in 1930 and took place again in 1934 and 1938, before being cancelled in 1942 and 1946 because of the Second World War. Since its return in 1950 the games have continued to take place every four years and are being held in Glasgow for the second time in 12 years,

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the night session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow, with medals up for grabs in Para Powerlifting, Swimming, and Para Swimming.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games - Daily Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 2026 Games.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow - Boxing
programme.desc: Action from the second session on the first day of the Games.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games - Artistic Gymnastics
programme.desc: Action from the second session on the first day of the Games.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games - Swimming & Para Swimming
programme.desc: Action from the second session on the first day of the Games.

programme.title: Live: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Dunkin' Park in Hartford, Conn.

programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Davis Diamond in College Station, Texas.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: 2026 WNBA 3-Point and Skills Challenge
programme.desc: WNBA players compete in 3-point shooting and skills competitions during All-Star weekend.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 10th round of the season, which took place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Gotham FC v Seattle Reign.

programme.title: NWSL
programme.desc: Denver Summit v Portland Thorns.

programme.title: Supercars Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the 2026 NTI Townsville 500.

programme.title: Supercars Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second day of the 2026 NTI Townsville 500.

programme.title: TCR World Tour Review
programme.desc: Action from round eight at Circuito Internacional de Vila Real in Portugal.

programme.title: British Superbikes Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the fifth round of the season at Brands Hatch.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic treble.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 final between Serie A rivals Juventus and AC Milan at Old Trafford. Paolo Maldini was aiming to lift the trophy as captain, just as his father had done in 1963.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Adelaide Crows v Collingwood Magpies.

programme.title: Live AFL
programme.desc: Melbourne Demons v Geelong Cats (Bounce-up 10.40am). Coverage of the match from Melbourne Cricket Ground.

programme.title: Live: Women's Cycling Pro Series
programme.desc: Coverage of the first stage of the 2026 Tour of Poland, a 141.8km route from Tomaszow Lubelski to Zamosc.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: A-Z: Commonwealth Games
programme.desc: A look at some of the stories, symbols, and standout moments that make this one of the world's most vibrant and exciting sporting events.

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games - Artistic Gymnastics
programme.desc: Coverage from the second session on the first day of the event, which takes place at The Arena in Glasgow.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Fremantle Dockers v West Coast Eagles.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: Action from the second day of the 10th round of the season, which took place at JCB Golf and Country Club in Rocester, Uttoxeter.

programme.title: TCR World Tour Review
programme.desc: Action from round eight at Circuito Internacional de Vila Real in Portugal.

programme.title: British Superbikes Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the fifth round of the season at Brands Hatch.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Melbourne Demons v Geelong Cats.

programme.title: Live: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From LECOM Park in Bradenton, Fla.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: From Highmark Stadium in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham sits down with legendary auteur James Cameron; the filmmaker reflects on his earliest steps into cinema, his demanding reputation, and his cautious views on AI moviemaking; Cameron shares stories from the sets of his most iconic films.

programme.title: CIRCA SURVIVOR
programme.desc: Circa Survivor returns bigger, bolder, and with more on the line than ever before, with $18.7 million waiting at the finish line for anyone tough enough to get there. We take you inside the growth of the most electrifying sports contest in America.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From LECOM Park in Bradenton, Fla.

programme.title: AAPB Game of the Week
programme.desc: Recent games from the American Association of Professional Baseball.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tiffany Greene is a sports commentator who carries forward the legacy of her remarkable parents, whose accomplishments and guidance paved the way for her own success.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From Victory Field in Indianapolis.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From LECOM Park in Bradenton, Fla.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From Victory Field in Indianapolis.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: This month in Minneapolis, we talk with a collector who has over 3000 in-person autograph cards in his collection. We also visit the only baseball glove repair shop in the U.S. and highlight a card show designed just for kids with special needs.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: Following the real daily life of a local card shop based in Lancaster, Pa. Go behind-the-scenes of sports cards and memorabilia through the eyes of a small, but successful, family-owned business.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From PNC Park in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Detroit hosts Kansas City for the opening game of their four-game series at Comerica Park. The visiting Royals rely on shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to spark the offense against Detroit who look to maintain dominance in this series as they lead 4-2.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 23, 2026.

programme.title: The Blue Jays Way
programme.desc: Heartbreak, star power and a franchise-shifting gamble push the Jays toward their championship destiny.

programme.title: Misplays of the Month
programme.desc: A look at the month's top bloopers.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 23, 2026.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 23, 2026.

programme.title: Misplays of the Month
programme.desc: A look at the month's top bloopers.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Nik Airball, Eli Elezra, Mark Ianelli, Jennifer Tilly, Eric Persson and Phil Hellmuth play $100/$200 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Dodgers and the Mets meet for the opening game of their three-game series at Citi Field. Right-handed pitcher Roki Sasaki leads the Dodgers, while the Mets rely on Juan Soto who leads the team in home runs, RBIs and batting average.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Live Ladies European Tour Golf
programme.desc: The second round of the 2026 ISPS Handa Women's Scottish Open at Dundonald Links in Ayrshire, Scotland.

programme.title: Live Hungarian F1 GP: Practice 1
programme.desc: The opening F1 practice session of Hungarian Grand Prix weekend. Kimi Antonelli returned to the top step last week, overcoming Charles Leclerc's challenge for the Spa race win.

programme.title: Ted Looks at the Regulation Change
programme.desc: Sky F1's Ted Kravitz analyses the new rule changes set to come into effect during Miami Grand Prix weekend.

programme.title: Sports Desk
programme.desc: A breakdown of the stories hitting the news desk this afternoon, with live analysis and comment plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix take on Trent Rockets at Edgbaston. A fourth-placed finish for Trent Rockets last year saw them fall just short of the knockouts.

programme.title: Live: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix take on last year's runners-up Trent Rockets at Edgbaston. The Rockets look to go one step further this year after defeat in the 2025 final.

programme.title: Live World Matchplay Darts Q/Fs
programme.desc: Day seven of the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay at the iconic Winter Gardens in Blackpool.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McClane (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building and must shoot through the glass window to break through to safety; reconstructing the scene using the same Beretta 92 handgun and office glass.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: The Hancock Ranch is 56 miles of harsh Wyoming prairie, but they make it work.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our Editors review the new version of the beloved Colt M-5 Carbine.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Eugene Stoner is one of the United States' most prolific military small arms designers of modern times; but Eugene Stoner wants to create something that he hopes can be revolutionary; a firearm that can be easily reconfigured for different needs, the Stoner 63.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: Dirt Trax TV is the trusted source North American ATV and UTV enthusiasts turn to for Test Ride reviews of today's most popular off-road vehicles. Fans of Dirt Trax TV are also treated to detailed in-shop technical mods and maintenance features along with travel guides showcasing popular off-road destinations.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Malfunction clearing and reloading must become second nature so you can focus on the assailant.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts Sitka blacktails on Prince of Wales Island in Alaska with his friends Ryan and Mark but ends up with a dinner of fried sea cucumbers.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and his buddies Ryan and Mark have better luck splitting up as they continue their quest for a Sitka black-tailed deer at the start of the rut.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: The Hancock Ranch is 56 miles of harsh Wyoming prairie, but they make it work.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our Editors review the new version of the beloved Colt M-5 Carbine.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Eugene Stoner is one of the United States' most prolific military small arms designers of modern times; but Eugene Stoner wants to create something that he hopes can be revolutionary; a firearm that can be easily reconfigured for different needs, the Stoner 63.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley takes a tour of the Northwoods in search of ruffed grouse.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: HuntWorxis a new show based around the ideology of the three major principles that aid in consistently harvesting mature animals. This plan, prep and pursue model has stood the test of time and continues to pay dividends for our cast year in and year out.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking up the Himalayan mountains on a challenging sheep hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: You would feed them if you could, wouldn't you? Some states allow the blessing in disguise of what some consider less than ideal.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In West Virginia, King, Brad Shingler, and Justin Rose face off against the wilderness, landing King's first powerful black bear in a heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse in

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: RNT-V is based around the RNT Call Shop in Stuttgart, Arkansas — from chasing ducks and geese over fine retrievers in different parts of the country to uncovering the history of an old-time call maker. Hosted by World Champions who are all about the hunt!

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up-close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Smallmouth bass fishing on the Niagara River with guide Frank Campbell.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Big Deer Producer Justin Karnopp returns to his Oregon roots.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Hunting spot-and-stalk mule deer and antelope in Colorado is one of the best ways to kick off the season!

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: John Bergsma showcases fishing hot spots in the Great Lakes region.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Favorite moments from "Dropped" seasons 1-8.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry invites good friends Keith Heinlein and Skip Knowles to hunt ducks and quail in Mexico.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years, Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Experience the heart-pounding action of fair-chase whitetail hunting with host Kyle Wieter and the entire Adrenaline crew as they pursue giant Midwestern bucks. This dedicated team embraces the challenges of the hunt, navigating intense highs, unexpected lows, and the unpredictable nature of these ultimate survival machines.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our Editors review the new version of the beloved Colt M-5 Carbine.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Eugene Stoner is one of the United States' most prolific military small arms designers of modern times; but Eugene Stoner wants to create something that he hopes can be revolutionary; a firearm that can be easily reconfigured for different needs, the Stoner 63.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Sarah Rhodes, Berney Blue, and Chase Clark as they chase big whitetails in different parts of the country.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Illinois is a whitetail hunter's dream and there's no place better to be during the rut than the Grigsby.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: During the cold closing days of elk season, Steve ascends thousands of feet into the Bitterroot Mountains of Western Montana seeking a legal bull.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: On an angling expedition along the Rewa River in Guyana, Steve and his Macushi guides catch exotic species such as black piranha and vampire fish.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Favorite moments from "Dropped" seasons 1-8.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Bruce Pettet leads a fifth-generation family company on an unrelenting mission to make the best optics in America.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Leopardstown and Wexford.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's racing action from Sandown.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's racing action from Leopardstown and Wexford.

programme.title: This Racing Life
programme.desc: Our Racing TV cameras are out and about exploring the stories behind the racing on track.

programme.title: Mark Your Card
programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Thirsk, York, Sandown, Cork and Kilbeggan.

programme.title: This Racing Life
programme.desc: Our Racing TV cameras are out and about exploring the stories behind the racing on track.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Thirsk, Nottingham, York and Sandown.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Cork and Kilbeggan.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch yesterday's racing action from Thirsk, Nottingham, York and Sandown.

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: From Aug. 5, 2019.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: A year-by-year look at the team's most exciting comebacks, big hits, clutch performances and walk-off homers - all on full display for Mets fans to relive.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Ideal Prostate+ Provides Safe Natural Relief
programme.desc: Ideal Prostate is the only Prostate Formula with a patented blend to relieve both PROSTATE & BLADDER Symptoms. Tune in for a Special TV offer!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: Francisco Alvarez and Pete Alonso save the day. From May 17, 2023.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Live: The Carton Show with Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle
programme.desc: Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle take on major sports storylines featuring heated debates and strong, often controversial, opinions.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 2005.

programme.title: Broadway Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: Tennis
programme.desc: Coverage from the world of tennis.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Breathtaking views of the Ten Mile Range provide a beautiful setting for this Rocky Mountain course designed by Pete and Perry Dye. Learn about course amenities and events, and get tips to improve your game.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Tennis
programme.desc: Coverage from the world of tennis.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from some of sport's greatest careers and dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: MLF All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 2 with angler commentary.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Riverdale Dunes is a top-rated, Scottish-style course set next to the South Platte River; learn about course amenities and events, and get tips to improve your game.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5

programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: By the Books
programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics

programme.title: MotoGP Films
programme.desc: A look back at some MotoGP action.

programme.title: Live: Super League On Sportsnet
programme.desc: Rugby action from Super League series.

programme.title: Live: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of all the action from the matches played as part of the Rugby Super League.

programme.desc: From DIY Kitchens Stadium in Wakefield, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From Accor Stadium in Sydney.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays host the Rays in the final game of a four-game American League East series at Rogers Centre. The home Blue Jays rely on right-handed Shane Bieber on the mound, while the Rays counter with rookie left-hander Ian Seymour.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From July 23, 2026.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Atlanta Braves and the Baltimore Orioles meet at Oriole Park at Camden Yards for the opening match of a three-game series. Right-handed pitcher Grant Holmes is the probable starter for the Braves against left-handed pitcher Trevor Rogers.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: A ride catching high-flying sailfish, blackfin tuna, yellow jacks, yellowtail snapper, mutton snapper, giant barracuda and more with Match Point Charters Capt. Jack Walker in Key West.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz wrap up their day with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain make a pit stop at Robbie's in Islamorada on their way to Key West to fish offshore with Capt. Chris Hanson.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew embarks on a multi-day offshore adventure from Clearwater to the legendary Florida Middle Grounds, targeting giant hogfish, grouper and snapper while diving historic wrecks and battling sharks along the way.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter heads to Cabo to host the Sportfishing Championship playoffs. Along the way, he targets striped marlin with teams Lights Out and Pacific Icon aboard the 46-foot Invincible Catamaran.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Highlighting popular saltwater activities in tropical destinations including inshore and offshore fishing and diving.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo Deep Drops off Bimini, Bahamas.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: A ride catching high-flying sailfish, blackfin tuna, yellow jacks, yellowtail snapper, mutton snapper, giant barracuda and more with Match Point Charters Capt. Jack Walker in Key West.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: The co-hosts float the small stream and are reminded of a few pastimes that exist which rival the draw of fly-fishing.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Phil Rowley and guest Tim Flagler are in Northern BC fly fishing multi species.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares a pan-roasted Rabbit with white wine orange thyme dressing with garlic-roasted egg noodle pasta.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Rick McGraw's collection of vintage vessels includes a 1916 Gold Cup winning raceboat, the Helena II.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Gary goes on a trip to a Yukon prospector's cabin to fish.
